caption:
Are you ready for Christmas in Dubai? 

Videos in this reel were taken from the past Christmas celebrations in the city:
🎄Souk Madinat
🔔 Dubai Festival City
❤️ Dubai Parks and Resorts
☃️ Ski Dubai
🎅 Expo 

Where will you be this year? Tag your fam and friends! 

#Christmas #ChristmasinDubai
